text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Sapporo Kinen has arrived. The
notable Umamusume who also intends to enter
the race appears at the airport...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's none other than Air Groove, the Empress
herself. She provokes Fine Motion's fighting spirit
by inviting her to "make it interesting."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion ponders whether it's possible to
somehow shock Air Groove, with one of her ideas
being to run with the "end closer" strategy...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It all depends on her form, but she smiles,
unfazed. "Even if I run normally, I've gotten so
good it's shocking in its own right."
